{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231627535D400A80324DA922F82E"}"},"total":512},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7552938121370436376","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很喜欢[飞吻]看多了西游阴谋论，还是这里面仙神符合我的想象，没有洪荒背景，单纯西游，有一种小时候看86西游记的感觉[飞吻]","text_exts":[{"e":54,"s":51,"text":"西游记","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%A5%BF%E6%B8%B8%E8%AE%B0&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774254473A922F82E%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227552938121370436376%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227528698998031387673%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%A5%BF%E6%B8%B8%E8%AE%B0%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1758555791,"group_id":"7528698998031387673","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"尝试写文却难以下手的未来大人物","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4SXC9DHUv4LwIwozk1XKE9sUQch5jFEJH6VpJQqssyX","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/38bff87ef64841099c7bb0684de2baea~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776793661&x-signature=KuBgUF%2FTF%2BVkW5ggiMUnZXFJ8yg%3D","user_id":"3255022029375197","user_name":"sasano"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3255022029375197","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7528698998031387673","book_info":{"abstract":"【西游】【非洪荒流】孔玄穿越成一颗鸟蛋，破壳而出后教训想要偷走【阴阳二气瓶】的同胞兄弟大鹏鸟，因为饥饿难耐便飞出巢穴寻找能吃的东西。
孔玄掠过大地吞吸无数生灵，但饥饿感还是无法消散。
这时，远处雪山顶上生起一团金光，吸引孔玄的注意。
“好吃～”
孔玄将光团吞入腹中后，才发现有些不对。
“怎么是个人？还长了一头的包？”

"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":15566,"reply_count":4,"show_pv":26405},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1758556927,"author_reply_time":1758556928,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7557199444846592793","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看，爱看，说实话的非常推荐，很值得一看！贴合原著，但是也夹杂了一些作者自己的想法！非常的不错，这两年洪荒体系太多了，难得有西游自己的体系[爱心]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1759549818,"group_id":"7528698998031387673","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"咳咳","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nz20rtdznz8M0UkBv17BsDm0gfhUew7i5jJW0q3LWFtG","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/7819da3963764d88b5e4207d95350e66~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788941&x-signature=pwkxUHWxdfVfDfHxUr%2F2C61lCq0%3D","user_id":"2307234832323968","user_name":"阿♥通"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2307234832323968","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7528698998031387673","book_info":{"abstract":"【西游】【非洪荒流】孔玄穿越成一颗鸟蛋，破壳而出后教训想要偷走【阴阳二气瓶】的同胞兄弟大鹏鸟，因为饥饿难耐便飞出巢穴寻找能吃的东西。

read_book_count":0,"read_duration":26517,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":7299},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1760410427,"author_reply_time":1760410431,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7586361663094424382","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"一口气追完二百多章，值得养书的存在（关于战力啥的这玩意太多人不看设定我只能说，在我这设定不出问题不吃设定，剧情没问题就是好书）剧情相对平淡但衔接还算流畅（佛系十足，但现在能这样平淡不爆雷安安稳稳走流程的剧情也是不多）一直重复到没到大乘那段剧情我是一口气追的所以有一种通畅感，但是难以想象当时追书的老哥们的便秘感，这个有待改进，总体还是值得一看打发时间的书"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1766345521,"group_id":"7528698998031387673","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"五字神人，扣1送金卡","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6ZqsOELdCFs0vWMRdaET5DeDljuZjYFIPU8u0XsjFPO","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/9a374bf43e2d48c0aec04eb7e81f5c55~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776789167&x-signature=H4BmKo%2F0HUYd9NjhjPgjMhzeiRA%3D","user_id":"2124726524975191","user_name":"寻舟亢道长"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2124726524975191","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":32,"fan_ranklist_title":"铁杆粉","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7528698998031387673","book_info":{"abstract":"【西游】【非洪荒流】孔玄穿越成一颗鸟蛋，破壳而出后教训想要偷走【阴阳二气瓶】的同胞兄弟大鹏鸟，因为饥饿难耐便飞出巢穴寻找能吃的东西。
